c AT 2 of 2025 Page 3

Charities Registration and Regulation (Amendment) Act 2025 Section 1
i
e
CHARITIES REGISTRATION AND REGULATION
(AMENDMENT) ACT 2025
Signed in Tynwald: 22 April 2025
Received Royal Assent: 22 April 2025
Announced to Tynwald: 22 April 2025
AN ACT to amend the Charities Registration and Regulation Act 2019 to provide
for the delegation of the regulatory functions of the Attorney General in
connection with charities.
BE IT ENACTED by the King’s Most Excellent Majesty, by and with the advice and
consent of the Council and Keys in Tynwald assembled, and by the authority of the
same, as follows: —
1 Short title
The short title of this Act is the Charities Registration and Regulation
(Amendment) Act 2025.
2 Commencement
This Act commences on the announcement of Royal Assent.
3 Amendment to the Charities Registration and Regulation Act 2019
[Substituted section 45 in the Charities Registration and Regulation Act 2019]
c AT 2 of 2025 Page 5

Endnotes Charities Registration and Regulation (Amendment) Act 2025
